hero.title: Invest in Farm Animals,
hero.subtitle: Connect with verified Kazakhstani farmers. Fund livestock, track growth, and share in the profits — all without owning a single animal.

howItWorks.title: From verification to payout
howItWorks.subtitle: Every investment follows the same six-stage path. Each stage produces a document or an on-platform status, not a promise.

step1.title: Choose an Animal
step1.description: Browse verified livestock listings from trusted farmers across Kazakhstan. See expected returns, duration, and full farmer profiles.

step2.title: Invest Your Capital
step2.description: Select how much you want to invest. The farmer raises and maintains the animal — you track progress from your dashboard.

step3.title: Share the Profit
step3.description: When the animal is sold, 70% of the profit goes to you. The farmer receives 30% for their work. Simple, transparent, fair.

verify.title: Farmer & asset verified
verify.description: Identity, farm papers, and animal registration are checked before listing is published.

fund.title: Investors fund the lot
fund.description: Slot-based funding with clear terms. You see the full cap table before committing.

track.title: Growth tracked on platform
track.description: Monthly updates, vet checks, weight and condition records — all timestamped.

sale.title: Pre-sale verification
sale.description: Independent check before the animal goes to market. You approve the sale window.

payout.title: Payout reconciliation
payout.description: Sale proceeds are split 70/30 by the disclosed formula. No hidden fees.

archive.title: Archive & report
archive.description: Full performance report stored in your portfolio. Reusable for future diligence.

passive.title: Passive Income
passive.description: Your capital works while farmers do the work. No farm management required.

transparent.title: Transparent Returns
transparent.description: Clear profit-sharing ratios. See exactly what you earn before you invest.

lowEntry.title: Low Entry Point
lowEntry.description: Start investing from as little as ₸50,000. Diversify across multiple animals.

tracked.title: Fully Tracked
tracked.description: Real-time status updates on your animals' health, growth, and sale progress.

proofs.transparent: Disclosed formula, fixed split, zero platform fee on profit.
proofs.tracked: Update cadence of at least one monthly status per active lot.
proofs.lowEntry: Minimum slot ₸50 000 · diversify across species and regions.
proofs.passive: No animal operations — stewardship stays with the verified farmer.

capital.title: Access to Capital
capital.description: Get funding for livestock without bank loans or collateral requirements.

noUpfront.title: No Upfront Costs
noUpfront.description: Investors cover the purchase price. Focus on what you do best — raising animals.

fair.title: Fair Profit Share
fair.description: Earn 30% of the profit for your expertise and hard work. Plus you keep your farm.

grow.title: Scale Your Herd
grow.description: Use the platform to grow your livestock numbers without increasing your own risk.

proofs.capital: No bank collateral required; investor funding covers the purchase.
proofs.noUpfront: Zero up-front platform cost; verification is free for farmers.
proofs.fair: Fixed 30% of profit, paid on the same rail as investors.
proofs.grow: Scale herd without per-animal personal risk.

featuredAnimals.title: Available Now
featuredAnimals.subtitle: Browse active investment opportunities from verified farmers
featuredAnimals.rationaleDetail: Highest-verification lots with open slots and strong return-to-term ratio.

profitSharing.title: Transparent 70/30 Split
profitSharing.subtitle: Every investment follows the same clear formula
profitSharing.investorDesc: You receive 70% of all profits from the animal sale
profitSharing.farmerDesc: The farmer earns 30% for their expertise and care
profitSharing.disclosure: Returns are gross and pre-tax. Actual payouts depend on sale price and animal health. No guarantees.

waterfall.title: Payout waterfall
waterfall.subtitle: Per ₸250 000 committed · 8-month term
waterfall.platformFeeNote: Zero fee on profit during launch period

trust.title: Built on Transparency

verified.title: Verified farmers
verified.description: Identity, farm registration and track record checked before onboarding.

legal.title: Legal agreement
legal.description: Binding digital contract per investment, signed by both parties.

updates.title: Regular updates
updates.description: Monthly status logs with weight, health, and farm conditions.

support.title: Support SLA
support.description: Response within one business day in Kazakh, Russian or English.

vetPassport.title: Vet passport
vetPassport.description: Veterinary certificate attached to each animal listing.
vetPassport.evidence: Form № 1, 2 · issued by district vet office

animalId.title: Animal ID
animalId.description: Unique platform ID plus state ear-tag number where applicable.

payoutHistory.title: Payout history
payoutHistory.description: Ledger of every past payout, reconciled against the sale document.

docViewer.title: Document viewer
docViewer.description: Inspect every document from your dashboard — vet, sale, payout.

trust.subtitle: Each trust signal is tied to a document or a platform state. Open any lot to inspect the originals.
trust.closureNote: Every investor can access the full document pack for a lot before committing capital. If a document is missing, the lot cannot be published.

footer.disclaimer: Investing in livestock carries risk. Returns are not guaranteed and depend on animal health, market prices, and farmer performance. Past results do not predict future outcomes. Please read the risk disclosures before investing.

detail.legalNote: By investing you accept the legal agreement and confirm you have read the risk disclosures.

catalog.searchPlaceholder: Search name, breed, farm or region
catalog.emptyHint: Try clearing filters or searching a different term.
catalog.trustNote: Every lot shown here has a published vet passport, a verified farmer, and a document pack accessible before funding.

dueDiligence.scenariosNote: Projections only. Actual payout depends on market price at sale, animal health and farmer performance. Returns are not guaranteed.
dueDiligence.documentsIntro: Every document below is attached to this asset and can be inspected before investing. Contracts are version-locked.
dueDiligence.documentsNote: Documents are stored with IPFS backing. Tabyn keeps a permanent audit trail of every revision.
dueDiligence.updatesIntro: Monthly status logs from the farmer and independent verifications, in reverse-chronological order.

u1.title: Weight check — on schedule
u1.body: Routine weight and condition measurement completed. Animal is within the expected growth curve for its age and breed.

u2.title: Pasture transition
u2.body: Animal moved to the summer pasture rotation. Diet and water access documented; vaccination up to date.

u3.title: Independent vet check
u3.body: District vet conducted a standard physical inspection. No issues identified. Certificate attached to the Documents tab.

u4.title: Listing published
u4.body: Asset verified and accepted for funding. Documents pack finalised.

dueDiligence.riskExplain: The overall level is derived from expected return, farmer track record and liquidity characteristics. Individual risks are listed below.

marketPrice.title: Market price volatility
marketPrice.body: Sale price at term end depends on livestock market conditions. Historical price bands are used to build Bear / Base / Bull projections.

health.title: Animal health
health.body: Disease, injury or mortality may reduce the final sale value. Vet monitoring is mandatory; insurance covers catastrophic loss.

weather.title: Weather & feed
weather.body: Severe weather may affect pasture and feed costs, which can shift sale timing or margins.

fx.title: Currency
fx.body: All amounts are denominated in ₸ (KZT). Investors converting from other currencies assume the associated FX risk.

liquidity.title: Liquidity
liquidity.body: Investments cannot be redeemed before the sale event. Committed capital is locked until payout reconciliation.

farmerPerformance.title: Farmer performance
farmerPerformance.body: Mitigated by verification, monthly updates and an on-time payout track record. Repeat offenders are removed from the platform.

dueDiligence.riskFooter: This list is not exhaustive. Read the full risk disclosures before investing.

credentials.farmReg: Farm registration on file with the state registry
credentials.breedAssoc: Member of the breed association of Kazakhstan

meta.defaultTitle: Tabyn — Traceable capital in living assets
meta.defaultDescription: Kazakhstan agri-investment platform. Fund verified livestock, track every asset with documents, share profit transparently.

catalog.title: Livestock catalog
catalog.description: Browse verified livestock investment lots across Kazakhstan. Every asset has a vet passport, a verified farmer and a document pack open for due diligence.

animal.title: {name} — {breed}
animal.fallbackDescription: Verified livestock investment lot on Tabyn. Vet passport, farm registration and contract available for review.
animal.notFoundDescription: This livestock lot is no longer available on Tabyn.

dashboard.title: Portfolio
dashboard.description: Your Tabyn investor cockpit — positions, exposure, upcoming payouts, documents.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in to your Tabyn account.

signup.title: Create account
signup.description: Join Tabyn as an investor or a farmer. Two-step onboarding.

dashboard.title: Farm control room
dashboard.description: Manage listings, post monthly updates, review investor interest.

addAnimal.title: New listing
addAnimal.description: Publish a new livestock investment lot on Tabyn.

manifesto.p1: Tabyn does not trade in promises. Each investment lot on the platform is a living asset on a real farm — a cow that walks out to pasture at dawn, a mare that knows the steppe, a flock whose wool is weighed every autumn.
manifesto.p2: Our job is to keep the distance between you and that asset honest. Every document lives in the lot. Every update comes from the farmer. Every payout is traced back to the sale that funded it. Nothing more, nothing less.
manifesto.imageAlt: A working livestock farm at golden hour

principles.title: What we carry across every lot
principles.subtitle: Four commitments that shape how we verify farmers, photograph assets, build contracts, and pay out profit.

stewardship.title: Stewardship first
stewardship.body: The farmer stays in charge of the animal. Your capital enables the work; it does not dictate it. We select partners who treat their herd like family, not inventory.
stewardship.imageAlt: Close portrait of a dairy cow

proof.title: Proof over promise
proof.body: Every lot publishes its vet passport, farm registration, breed certificate and signed contract before funding opens. If a document is missing, the lot does not go live.
proof.imageAlt: A flock of sheep inside a farm pen

local.title: Rooted in the region
local.body: We are a Kazakhstani platform for Kazakhstani agriculture. Our verification partners, veterinary services and breed associations are all local — so accountability is local, too.
local.imageAlt: Horses on a farm at sunrise

longTerm.title: Long-term by design
longTerm.body: Livestock cycles measure in months, not minutes. We build the product to reward patience: clear timelines, honest forecasts, and no pressure to trade against yourself.

origin.label: Origin
origin.name: Tabyn · Almaty, Kazakhstan
origin.body: Founded in 2025 by a small team with roots in agriculture, finance and engineering. We operate across the Almaty, Karaganda and Astana regions, working exclusively with farmers we have met in person and whose herds we have seen on the ground.

gallery.title: Our farms, without filters
gallery.subtitle: Every asset on Tabyn lives on a real farm in Kazakhstan. Before a lot is published, our team visits the farm, documents the conditions, and photographs the herd. What you see below is not stock imagery — it is the working world your capital enters.

landscape.title: Open pasture
landscape.body: Cattle grazing on open land in the Almaty region. Natural feed and space are the baseline — we verify pasture access before any lot is funded.

farm.title: Daily operations
farm.body: Morning feeding inside the barn. Each farm we work with keeps a documented schedule for feed, water and veterinary checks, and submits monthly reports to investors.

pasture.title: Premium assets
pasture.body: Registered Kazakh-breed horses at a partner stud farm. High-value lots receive an independent pre-sale valuation before any market transaction.

herd.title: The people behind the lot
herd.body: Every listing on Tabyn is tied to a specific farmer, with an ID, a farm registration, and a track record. You invest in an animal — but you are also backing the person who raises it.

trust.title: Young stock, tracked from day one
trust.body: Newborn and growing animals are logged on the platform with vet records, weight checks and photos, so their progress is visible to investors throughout the term.

cmd.signupHint: Invest as investor or list as farmer
